conditions.description: Conditions evaluated against the enrollment data. Empty/absent → unconditional branch to yesNextStepId.

field.description: Dotted-path into the enrollment object (e.g., 'subscriberEmail' or 'metadata.score').

operator.description: Comparison operator. matches_regex rejects patterns longer than 200 chars.

value.description: Right-hand side of the comparison. Unused for is_empty/is_not_empty/is_set/is_not_set.

conditionLogic.description: How to combine multiple condition results.

yesNextStepId.description: Step ID to branch to when the conditions are met (or when conditions[] is empty).

noNextStepId.description: Step ID to branch to when the conditions are NOT met.

enrollment.description: Enrollment record. The condition evaluator merges this with `{ enrollmentId: enrollment.id }` before path-resolving each condition.field.
